response: To determine the total number of writing prompts, we first calculate the number of groups. With 24 residents and 6 participants per group, there are 4 groups in total. Emily initially allocates 3 prompts to each of the 4 groups, which equals 12 prompts. She also has a reserve collection in her library of 10 extra prompts to be shared equally among the groups. Adding the initial 12 prompts to the 10 extra prompts results in a total of 22 prompts needed for the session. This comprehensive set ensures that every group has access to a well-stocked library of creative ideas. The END.
